_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) and edit. 'roots' are the NEW…TO REVIEW trees to serve. bind 0.0.0.0 makes it reachable from any Mac/iPad on the LAN.
_auth: Set authUser + authPasswordSHA256 (sha256 of the password) to require Basic Auth. Both empty = open. Generate a hash: python3 -c 'import hashlib,getpass;print(hashlib.sha256(getpass.getpass().encode()).hexdigest())'
